## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce new hires to company operations and provide an overview of tools, policies, and upcoming initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/VyyLc5YdZLkCGoF4YsiE6kGkTwq_Hunh?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Unlimited PTO policy encourages taking 4 weeks off annually; communicate with managers and use Slack status for transparency](https://fathom.video/share/VyyLc5YdZLkCGoF4YsiE6kGkTwq_Hunh?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
  - [4-hour overlap with PST is crucial for collaboration and attending company meetings](https://fathom.video/share/VyyLc5YdZLkCGoF4YsiE6kGkTwq_Hunh?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [New initiatives: Loom for async communication, Deal Engage for onboarding/training, expense policy updates, and performance management tools](https://fathom.video/share/VyyLc5YdZLkCGoF4YsiE6kGkTwq_Hunh?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)

## Topics

### Tool Access and Onboarding

  - [Notion houses the onboarding checklist, which will be refined for team-specific needs](https://fathom.video/share/VyyLc5YdZLkCGoF4YsiE6kGkTwq_Hunh?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [Key tools: 1Password, Notion, Slack, Adios CRM (Zapier-based)](https://fathom.video/share/VyyLc5YdZLkCGoF4YsiE6kGkTwq_Hunh?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [LastPass contains team vault access; personal vaults available](https://fathom.video/share/VyyLc5YdZLkCGoF4YsiE6kGkTwq_Hunh?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Action item: New hires to review tool list and notify of missing access](https://fathom.video/share/VyyLc5YdZLkCGoF4YsiE6kGkTwq_Hunh?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)

### Unlimited PTO Policy

  - [Aim for \~4 weeks off annually, no exact amount specified](https://fathom.video/share/VyyLc5YdZLkCGoF4YsiE6kGkTwq_Hunh?tab=summary&timestamp=368.0)
  - [Give 2-week notice for vacations, especially for customer-facing roles](https://fathom.video/share/VyyLc5YdZLkCGoF4YsiE6kGkTwq_Hunh?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [Use Google Calendar invites to notify colleagues of PTO](https://fathom.video/share/VyyLc5YdZLkCGoF4YsiE6kGkTwq_Hunh?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Flexible work hours, focus on quality and task completion](https://fathom.video/share/VyyLc5YdZLkCGoF4YsiE6kGkTwq_Hunh?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [International employees encouraged to take their national holidays](https://fathom.video/share/VyyLc5YdZLkCGoF4YsiE6kGkTwq_Hunh?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Time Zone Collaboration

  - [4-hour overlap with PST required for efficient communication](https://fathom.video/share/VyyLc5YdZLkCGoF4YsiE6kGkTwq_Hunh?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [Company and team meetings typically scheduled in PST mornings](https://fathom.video/share/VyyLc5YdZLkCGoF4YsiE6kGkTwq_Hunh?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Flexibility allowed, but consistent overlap is important](https://fathom.video/share/VyyLc5YdZLkCGoF4YsiE6kGkTwq_Hunh?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)

### Upcoming Initiatives

  - [Loom (or similar tool) for asynchronous communication and training](https://fathom.video/share/VyyLc5YdZLkCGoF4YsiE6kGkTwq_Hunh?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [Deal Engage platform for structured onboarding courses and modules](https://fathom.video/share/VyyLc5YdZLkCGoF4YsiE6kGkTwq_Hunh?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Expense policy update based on "freedom and responsibility" principle](https://fathom.video/share/VyyLc5YdZLkCGoF4YsiE6kGkTwq_Hunh?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Annual company offsite and potential team gatherings](https://fathom.video/share/VyyLc5YdZLkCGoF4YsiE6kGkTwq_Hunh?tab=summary&timestamp=818.0)
  - [Performance management system within Deal (30-day, 90-day, ongoing reviews)](https://fathom.video/share/VyyLc5YdZLkCGoF4YsiE6kGkTwq_Hunh?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)

### Feedback and Communication

  - [Slack preferred for submitting feedback and ideas](https://fathom.video/share/VyyLc5YdZLkCGoF4YsiE6kGkTwq_Hunh?tab=summary&timestamp=959.0)
  - [Plans to create a suggestion box in Notion for centralized feedback collection](https://fathom.video/share/VyyLc5YdZLkCGoF4YsiE6kGkTwq_Hunh?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
  - [Encouragement to flag outdated or irrelevant information in Notion](https://fathom.video/share/VyyLc5YdZLkCGoF4YsiE6kGkTwq_Hunh?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

## Next Steps

  - [New hires to review tool access list and notify of any missing access](https://fathom.video/share/VyyLc5YdZLkCGoF4YsiE6kGkTwq_Hunh?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [Team to provide feedback on onboarding process and suggest improvements](https://fathom.video/share/VyyLc5YdZLkCGoF4YsiE6kGkTwq_Hunh?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
  - [Bridget to work on implementing new initiatives (Loom, Deal Engage, expense policy)](https://fathom.video/share/VyyLc5YdZLkCGoF4YsiE6kGkTwq_Hunh?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)
  - [Everyone to flag outdated information in Notion to managers or Bridget](https://fathom.video/share/VyyLc5YdZLkCGoF4YsiE6kGkTwq_Hunh?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Bridget to update company handbook in Notion with current information](https://fathom.video/share/VyyLc5YdZLkCGoF4YsiE6kGkTwq_Hunh?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
